title: REI Integrations (RE2)
description: REI Integrations for mods that don't support REI!
body:
![RE2 Banner Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Jab125/Jab125/main/imgs/re2.png)
**REI Integrations (RE2)** is a mod that adds REI integrations for certain mods that don't provide REI support by default.

**Requires Roughly Enough Items, Architectury API, and MrCrayfish's Refurbished Furniture Mod!**

Example:
![Example image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dMwUKI3J/images/34e74bf822296f994791ceab57a2a3ca3848f137.png)
